title: SAP SD Senior Consultant
description:
Job Title: SAP Sales & Distribution Developer

Job Description: This is both an SAP project delivery-focused role, managing complex SAP ERP implementation & configuration, as well as taking care of the tickets issue from several clients to support their queries. The consultant must be able to travel frequently locally.

Pre-Requisites:

  • Must have strong SAP SD working experience with all business partners and manage relationships
  • Able to configure and end to end activities of integrated global business solution implementations

Description:

  • As a Consultant, you will be working with our client(s) cross-functional teams, IT development team and business users at the consulting level
  • Involved in the full SAP implementation, customization and configuration including data gathering and analysis on user requirement, project design with strong project implementation in Sales & Distribution, post-implementation support and roll-out.
  • You will also be involved in carrying out SAP SD implementation projects integration with other modules like Material Management.
  • Strong technical skills in all areas of the SAP SD Billing, SAP SD Returns Processing, Order-to-Cash processes, logistic execution, info structure creation, configuration and updated rules, etc in a manufacturing environment
  • Conducting structured testing internally and with users; Ensuring stabilization of the solution and continuous improvements

Requirements:

  • Must have a minimum of 2 years in SAP SD in system configuration and implementation projects; with more than 3 years in consulting experience is preferred
  • Should have worked on Core SAP SD areas and having HANA S/4 SD would be added advantage Critical SD area, Org Str, Order Management, Delivery Management, Billing area, ATP Pricing, etc
  • Involved in at least 2-3 full cycle of SAP SD delivery implementation projects with SAP MM and or SAP EWM integration
  • Have supporting testing and data migration experience, as well as drafting of functional specification for reports, interface, enhancement, forms
  • Knowledge of G2B Ticketing Tools will be an added advantage
  • Strong experience in the development of custom reports and enhancements.
  • Strong organizational/planning skills with the ability to prioritize and work effectively in a fast-paced environment, proficiency in multi-tasking
  • Able to start immediately
  • Consulting experience is most preferred

*Please note that salary is determined on related experience and skill

Personal Attributes:

  • You must have an excellent analytical, presentation and soft skills including communication on how to handle existing clients and be client-oriented with excellent problem-solving skills
  • You must possess a personal attribute such as creativity, positive thinking, quick learning, imagination, leadership, judgment and maturity, curiosity, strong interpersonal skills, professional integrity and initiative
  • Confident in communicating and presenting at the business level to MNC clients.

Take this opportunity to join an international team of professionals, implement and develop software and consulting solutions in international projects and gain cultural experience, to set a serious foundation for future career steps.

For this position, interested applicants can apply directly by clicking "Easy Apply"

ABeam Consulting (S) Pte Ltd

18 Cross Street #10-05/09 China Square Central Singapore 048423

Tel: +65 6922 5270

Website: www.abeam.com

We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Additional note to applicants

  • Only candidates with profiles and CV’s matching job requirements will be considered and contacted for interviews. In case you do not receive any response from us within four weeks of your application, your application was not considered. Due to the high number of applications we receive, we cannot entertain each individual follow-up.
  • Processing of applications will start approximately two weeks after a job posting date. The selection process is expected to take another two to four weeks.

postedCompany.description:
ABEAM CONSULTING (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

ABeam Consulting is a global management consulting firm with headquarters in Japan and with more than 4400 professionals in more than 11 countries and serve over 700 clients throughout Asia, the Americas, and Europe, providing business performance consulting services, integrating business strategy, business process design, information technology enablement, outsourcing and organizational performance and program / project management solutions to our clients. 

ABeam retains a powerful base of professional talent coupled with a global reach which we are recruiting top notch resources for. We currently have the following permanent positions:
